style_guide_v1.list_vs_string: fields holding multiple items MUST be lists, not comma-separated strings
style_guide_v1.dict_vs_string: structured fields (verdict, sentinel, summary) MUST be dict if multi-attribute, str only for single-line slug
style_guide_v1.timestamps: ts_utc REQUIRED in ISO-8601 with timezone; ts_kst optional sibling
